title: Kanban Board View Template for development

posts.author: brandonhuynh (Brandon H)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,

I would like to customize the current Kanban view to by creating my own app. Are there code templates of the current board views?

There are only 3 templates to select from when creating a new feature in my app and working with the existing Kanban view code would be significantly helpful.

image1821×849 41.1 KB

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @brandonhuynh,

We do not have templates for the native monday.com views like Kanban.

The ones you see there are the ones that are available

Cheers,
Matias
